chapter_title: Department of the California Highway Patrol
text: All members of the California Highway Patrol have the powers of a peace officer as provided in Section 830.2 of the Penal Code.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 2. ADMINISTRATION [1500 - 3093]
### Chapter 2. Department of the California Highway Patrol [2100 - 2482]
#### Article 3. Powers and Duties [2400 - 2429.9]
##### § 2409

All members of the California Highway Patrol have the powers of a peace officer as provided in Section 830.2 of the Penal Code.

*(Amended by Stats. 1971, Ch. 938.)*

subsections.text: All members of the California Highway Patrol have the powers of a peace officer as provided in Section 830.2 of the Penal Code.
